Adult Shelter Connect at St. Olaf Church
Hours: M-F 10 am–5 pm; Sat & Sun 1–5 pm. Calls will be answered after regular hours.
Single adults access all Minneapolis shelters through this office.
Phone: 612-596-1223 Provides: Call COPE when a severe disturbance of mood or thinking threatens a person’s safety or the safety of others.
Provides: Crisis advocates available to talk with anyone experiencing domestic violence, sexual violence or human trafficking. 24-Hour Crisis Phone: 952-884-0330 or toll-free 1-866-223-1111
Hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
Text MN to 741741 to be connected to a counselor who will help diffuse a crisis and help connect to local resources.
Hours: Monday through Friday from 8 am–4 pm.
Provides: Intake center for Hennepin County social services.
Phone: 1-888-234-1329 Information and referral to metro-area shelter/housing.
Provides: Helps locate food shelves and meals.
St. Stephen’s Human Services Street Outreach

Phone: 612-879-7624 or toll-free, 1-888-550-7624 Remarks: Works with individuals and veterans sleeping outside or in places unsuitable for human habitation, and assists them to get into permanent housing. Provides a non-emergency response to homeless concerns in public settings with a mobile outreach team able to visit individuals in the community.
